 {"id":"bd-fi05","title":"bd sync fails with orphaned issues and duplicate ID conflict","description":"After fixing the deleted_at TEXT column scanning bug (commit 18b1eb2), bd sync still fails with two issues:

1. Orphan Detection Warning: 12 orphaned child issues whose parents no longer exist (bd-cb64c226.* and bd-cbed9619.*)

2. Import Failure: UNIQUE constraint failed for bd-360 - this tombstone exists in both DB and JSONL

Error: "Import failed: error creating depth-0 issues: bulk insert issues: failed to insert issue bd-360: sqlite3: constraint failed: UNIQUE constraint failed: issues.id"

Fix options:
- Delete orphaned child issues with bd delete
- Resolve bd-360 duplicate (in deletions.jsonl vs tombstone in DB)
- Reset sync branch: git branch -f beads-sync main && git push --force-with-lease origin beads-sync","notes":"Fixed tombstone constraint violation bug. When deleting closed issues, the CHECK constraint (status = 'closed') = (closed_at IS NOT NULL) was violated because CreateTombstone didn't clear closed_at. Fix: set closed_at = NULL in tombstone creation SQL.

The sync data corruption (orphaned issues in beads-sync branch) requires manual cleanup: reset sync branch with 'git branch -f beads-sync main && git push --force-with-lease origin beads-sync'","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-13T07:14:33.831346-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-25T01:21:01.952723-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"bug"}
 {"id":"bd-fjuf","title":"Work on gt-8tmz.10: Rename Engineer in Box to Shiny. Rena...","description":"Work on gt-8tmz.10: Rename Engineer in Box to Shiny. Rename mol-engineer-in-box references to mol-shiny or just 'shiny'. Update docs and code in internal/formula/ and .beads/formulas/. When done: 1) bd close gt-8tmz.10, 2) bd sync, 3) git push, 4) gt mq submit","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-25T19:26:18.426959-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T19:30:19.947382-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T19:30:19.947382-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-fkdw","title":"Update bash-agent example with Agent Mail integration","description":"Add Agent Mail integration to examples/bash-agent/agent.sh using curl for HTTP calls.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Health check function using curl
- Reserve issue before claiming
- Send notifications on status change
- Release on completion
- Graceful degradation if curl fails
- No bash errors when Agent Mail unavailable

 {"id":"bd-fom","title":"Remove all deletions.jsonl code except migration","description":"There's deletions manifest code spread across the entire codebase that should have been removed after tombstone migration:

Files with deletions code (non-migration):
- internal/deletions/ - entire package
- cmd/bd/sync.go - 25+ references, auto-compact, sanitize
- cmd/bd/delete.go - dual-writes to deletions.jsonl
- internal/importer/importer.go - checks deletions manifest
- internal/syncbranch/worktree.go - merges deletions.jsonl
- cmd/bd/doctor/fix/sync.go - cleanupDeletionsManifest
- cmd/bd/doctor/fix/deletions.go - HydrateDeletionsManifest
- cmd/bd/integrity.go - checks deletions for data loss
- cmd/bd/deleted.go - entire command
- cmd/bd/compact.go - pruneDeletionsManifest
- cmd/bd/doctor.go - checkDeletionsManifest
- Plus many more

Action: Aggressively remove all non-migration deletions code. Tombstones are the only deletion mechanism now.","status":"tombstone","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-16T13:29:04.960863-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-17T16:11:17.070763-08:00","deleted_at":"2025-12-17T16:11:17.070763-08:00","deleted_by":"batch delete","delete_reason":"batch delete","original_type":"task"}
